quadlet.description: Track Quadlet .container images at both the rootful path and the rootless users/<uid>/ path.

packageRules.description: Container images (bootc base Containerfile FROM + Quadlet Image=): pin digests and split update types so major bumps are reviewed separately.
Digest-only updates (same semver tag, new content hash) are purely supply-chain security patches — safe to auto-merge once CI passes.
Headscale is pre-1.0; every minor (0.x) can carry breaking DB/config changes. Never auto-merge, always its own PR.
Group GitHub Actions bumps into a single PR.
